zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Beaufort Countess of Devon於1408年出生在英國米德萊可維斯特明斯特時，她的父親John Beaufort 1st Earl of Somerset35歲，母親Lady Margaret Holland Duchess of Clarence23歲。她於1431年與Sir Thomas Courtenay在英國戴文哈可姆結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1449年11月在英國戴文可利頓享年41歲，埋葬在英國戴文可利頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Beaufort Countess of Devon于1408年出生在英国米德萊可維斯特明斯特时，她的父亲John Beaufort 1st Earl of Somerset35岁，母亲Lady Margaret Holland Duchess of Clarence23岁。她于1431年与Sir Thomas Courtenay在英国戴文哈可姆结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1449年11月在英国戴文可利頓享年41岁，埋葬在英国戴文可利頓。

nameMeanings.name: Beaufort
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Beaufort . The surname Beauford is rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Beaufort Countess of Devon was born in 1408, in Westminster, Middlesex, England, her father, John Beaufort 1st Earl of Somerset, was 35 and her mother, Lady Margaret Holland Duchess of Clarence, was 23. She married Sir Thomas Courtenay in 1431, in Haccombe, Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 5 daughters. She died in November 1449, in Colyton, Devon, England, at the age of 41, and was buried in Colyton, Devon, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Beaufort Countess of Devon est née en 1408, à Westminster, Middlesex, Angleterre, son père, John Beaufort 1st Earl of Somerset, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Lady Margaret Holland Duchess of Clarence, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Thomas Courtenay en 1431, à Haccombe, Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée en novembre 1449, à Colyton, Devon, Angleterre, à l’âge de 41 ans, et a été enterrée à Colyton, Devon, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Beaufort Countess of Devon 1408 in Westminster, Middlesex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Beaufort 1st Earl of Somerset 35 und ihre Mutter Lady Margaret Holland Duchess of Clarence 23. Sie hat 1431 in Haccombe, Devon, England Sir Thomas Courtenay geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb im November 1449 im Alter von 41 Jahren in Colyton, Devon, England und wurde in Colyton, Devon, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Beaufort Countess of Devon è nata il nel 1408 nel Westminster, Middlesex, England, sua padre, John Beaufort 1st Earl of Somerset, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Lady Margaret Holland Duchess of Clarence, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Sir Thomas Courtenay nel 1431, nel Haccombe, Devon, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 5 figlie. Morì nel novembre 1449, nel Colyton, Devon, England, all'età di 41 anni, e fu sepolta a Colyton, Devon, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Beaufort Countess of Devonが1408年にイギリスミッドレセックスウエストミンスターで生まれた時，父John Beaufort 1st Earl of Somersetは35歳，母Lady Margaret Holland Duchess of Clarenceは23歳であった。1431年にイギリスデボンハッコインベでSir Thomas Courtenayと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1449年11月にイギリスデボンコリトンで41歳で死去し，イギリスデボンコリトンにて埋葬された。

ko.Precinct of St Katherine, Middlesex, Eng: 영국 미들레세스 플레신크트 프 스트 캐더이인
ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Beaufort Countess of Devon(이)가 1408년 영국 미들레세스 웨스트민스터에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Beaufort 1st Earl of Somerset(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Margaret Holland Duchess of Clarence(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1431년 영국 데폰 하치브에서 Sir Thomas Courtenay(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1449년 11월 영국 데폰 코리턴에서 41세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 데폰 코리턴에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Sir Thomas Courtenay em 1431, em Haccombe, Devon, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 5 filhas. ru.Precinct of St Katherine, Middlesex, Eng: пресинкт оф ст катираин, миддлесекс, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Beaufort Countess of Devon родилась в 1408 г. в местности вестминстир, миддлесекс, Англия, её отцу по имени John Beaufort 1st Earl of Somerset было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Margaret Holland Duchess of Clarence, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Thomas Courtenay в 1431 г. в местности хаккомб, девон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла ноябрь 1449 г. в местности колитон, девон, Англия в возрасте 41 год и была похоронена в местности колитон, девон, Англия.

Se casó con Sir Thomas Courtenay en 1431, en Haccombe, Devon, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió en noviembre de 1449, en Colyton, Devon, Inglaterra, a la edad de 41 años, y fue sepultada en Colyton, Devon, Inglaterra.
